title: Add shared Zephyr BLE app owner skeleton
description: Implement a gateway-internal BLE app owner that is the single caller of bt_enable(), bt_le_adv_start(), bt_le_adv_stop(), and advertising restart. Initial behavior must preserve today's mutually exclusive product modes and CONFIG_BT_MAX_CONN=1 assumptions while moving no payload semantics.
acceptance_criteria: native_sim or build tests cover one-owner init/advertising composition for current native, Meshtastic, and MeshCore product modes; unsupported combinations fail deterministically; no physical hardware required.
